configurations.name: Python http.server
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path[:] = [p for p in sys.path if p not in ('', '.')]; import http.server, socketserver, functools; socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address = True; socketserver.TCPServer(('', 8000), functools.partial(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, directory='/Users/s1/Documents/Hoverla-pendelbahn')).serve_forever()
